game_name: Battletoads & Double Dragon: The Ultimate Team

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Rope Swing
special_mechanics.description: Players can hang on and move across ropes/cables with special attack variations

physics_values.bashing_ball_charge: Wrecking-ball-like charge attack while hanging on cable (BT Bashing Ball)

special_mechanics.name: Ledge Hanging
special_mechanics.description: New ability to hang off and move across sides of platforms with risk mechanic

physics_values.fall_condition: Player can fall off and lose a life if other enemies step on fingers
physics_values.kick_attack: Back 'N Front Punt kick while hanging on ledge

special_mechanics.name: Speeder Bike
special_mechanics.description: Vehicle section with backward kick attacks

physics_values.attack: Bikin' Bash backward kicks while riding

special_mechanics.name: Dragon Force Techniques (Lee Brothers)
special_mechanics.description: Special moves for Billy and Jimmy Lee characters

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics and attack descriptions but no quantified movement parameters, physics values, or sub-pixel system details. Engine based on original 1991 Battletoads with less Double Dragon influence. Two-button attack/jump control scheme documented.
